_comment: Engineering on-call rotation config. Edit `members` to change the order or team. Slack member IDs look like U01ABC2DEF — find one via the Slack profile menu (the ⋮ button) → 'Copy member ID'.
_anchor_comment: A Monday (YYYY-MM-DD) used as week 0. The person at members[0] is on-call the week of anchor_monday; the rotation advances by one each subsequent week. Keep this fixed once set.
